ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package repository */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the package */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the package is actively maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports other packages */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "num_imports" INTEGER /* Number of imports from the imported package */,
  "import_methods" TEXT /* Methods imported from the imported package */,
  "import_classes" TEXT /* Classes imported from the imported package */,
  "required_packages" INTEGER /* Number of required packages */,
  "heaviness_from_parent" INTEGER /* Heaviness of dependency from the parent package */,
  "imported_version" TEXT /* Version of the imported package */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, transitive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author belongs to */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the author */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile */,
  "is_contributor" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the author is a contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is stable */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was deprecated */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* List of R versions with which the package is compatible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks */,
  "issues_open" INTEGER /* Number of open issues */,
  "issues_closed" INTEGER /* Number of closed issues */,
  "downloads_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of downloads in the last month */,
  "views_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of views in the last month */,
  "stars_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of stars in the last month */,
  "forks_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of forks in the last month */,
  "issues_open_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the last month */,
  "issues_closed_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of closed issues in the last month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_stats_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency graph */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "graph_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the dependency graph */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the graph was created */,
  "graph_type" TEXT /* Type of graph (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the graph is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_graphs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_tags_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is approved */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_comments_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
